basics.name: Neşet Fatih Biçkin
basics.label: Research Assistant and Integrated Ph.D. Student in Mechanical Engineering
basics.summary: Research Assistant and integrated Ph.D. student at Yeditepe University, specializing in computational mechanics, finite element analysis, and advanced simulation. My current research uses Firedrake and PETSc to investigate elastic-wave propagation and band-gap formation in two-dimensional periodic metamaterials.

highlights: Admitted directly to the doctoral program without completing a master's degree.
Specializing in computational mechanics, finite element analysis, and advanced simulation techniques.
Senior project: Upgrading an Existing Open-Source FEA Code to Determine Resonance in Piezoelectric Bodies.

items.title: Research Assistant
items.organization: Yeditepe University, Department of Mechanical Engineering
highlights: Support undergraduate laboratory courses while pursuing doctoral research in computational mechanics.

items.title: Student Assistant
highlights: Facilitated communication between the Mechanical Engineering Department and students.
Conducted problem-solving sessions for undergraduate Thermodynamics students.

items.title: Doctoral Research - Elastic Metamaterials
highlights: Model elastic-wave propagation and dispersion in two-dimensional periodic metamaterial unit cells.
Use Firedrake and PETSc to compute and tailor phononic band gaps through unit-cell geometry and material distribution.

items.title: Intern Researcher - TÜBİTAK 2519 COST International Working Group
highlights: Investigated the effects of aging on blood-vessel mechanical properties using in-vitro and in-silico mechanical behavior curves.

items.title: Intern Researcher - TÜBİTAK 2247-C Research Program
highlights: Performed numerical and theoretical analysis of coupled piezoelectric and elastic motion equations.
Validated analytical solutions with symbolic mathematics and open-source finite element models in FEniCS.

items.title: Open-Source FEA for Piezoelectric Resonance
highlights: Migrated a piezoelectric solver from FEniCS to FEniCSx, resolving compatibility issues and improving computational efficiency.
Simulated acoustic-piezoelectric interactions in metamaterials using advanced meshing and numerical techniques.

items.title: Summer Intern - Wind Tunnel Model Assembly Unit
items.organization: Turkish Aerospace Industries, Experimental Aerodynamics Directorate
highlights: Assisted with precision assembly of wind-tunnel models for aerodynamic testing, including the KAAN program.

items.title: Intern - Production and Maintenance Department
items.organization: Kalde Klima Medium Pressure Fittings and Valve Industry Inc.
highlights: Gained practical experience with lathe and milling operations for plastic-material processing.

items.title: Instrumentation and Design of Experiments (Laboratory)
items.summary: Laboratory assistant, 2 hours per week; course taught in English.

items.title: Engineering Drawing and Solid Modeling (Laboratory)
items.summary: Laboratory assistant, 4 hours per week; course taught in English.

items.title: System Dynamics and Control (Laboratory)
items.summary: Laboratory assistant, 4 hours per week; course taught in English.

items.title: President of the Board
items.organization: Yeditepe University Society of Mechanical Engineering (YUSOME)
highlights: Organized major events including the IZ'24 Career Fair and MechaniCareer.
Organized technical visits to strengthen industry ties and professional networking.

items.title: Board Member
items.organization: Yeditepe University Society of Mechanical Engineering (YUSOME)

presentations.name: Elastic Wave Propagation and Band-Gap Tailoring in 2D Metamaterial Unit Cells Using Firedrake
presentations.event: 32nd International Congress on Sound and Vibration (ICSV32), Paper 801
